markets.no_sub_title: Ryan Vilade: 3+
markets.rules_primary: If Ryan Vilade records 3+ total bases in the Tampa Bay vs St. Louis professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 4:15 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Ryan Vilade is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Ryan Vilade starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Ryan Vilade is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Ryan Vilade is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total bases recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Ryan Vilade: 2+
markets.rules_primary: If Ryan Vilade records 2+ total bases in the Tampa Bay vs St. Louis professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 4:15 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Ryan Vilade is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Ryan Vilade starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Ryan Vilade is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Ryan Vilade is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total bases recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Ryan Vilade: 3+
markets.rules_primary: If Ryan Vilade records 3+ hits in the Tampa Bay vs St. Louis professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 4:15 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Ryan Vilade is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Ryan Vilade starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Ryan Vilade is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Ryan Vilade is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Ryan Vilade: 2+
markets.rules_primary: If Ryan Vilade records 2+ hits in the Tampa Bay vs St. Louis professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 4:15 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Ryan Vilade is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Ryan Vilade starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Ryan Vilade is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Ryan Vilade is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.

markets.rules_primary: If Ryan Vilade records 1+ hits in the Tampa Bay vs St. Louis professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 4:15 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Ryan Vilade is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Ryan Vilade starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Ryan Vilade is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Ryan Vilade is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Ryan Vilade: 2+
markets.rules_primary: If Ryan Vilade records 2+ home runs in Tampa Bay vs St. Louis professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 4:15 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Ryan Vilade is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Ryan Vilade starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Ryan Vilade is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Ryan Vilade is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on home runs recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Ryan Vilade: 1+
markets.rules_primary: If Ryan Vilade records 1+ home runs in Tampa Bay vs St. Louis professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 4:15 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Ryan Vilade is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Ryan Vilade starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Ryan Vilade is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Ryan Vilade is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on home runs recorded.
